message:
Section 36: Caching and Memoization Patterns (~1105 lines)

CASS mining of beads_viewer, xf, cass implementations covering:
- Lazy initialization (OnceLock, sync.Once)
- TriageContext pattern for unified lazy caching
- Heap-based top-K collectors
- LRU cache with disk persistence
- In-memory cache with TTL
- SIMD-optimized dot product
- Parallel k-NN search with thread-local heaps
- Cache-efficient SoA data layouts
- Hash-based content deduplication
- Cache invalidation strategies

Closes meta_skill-hax
